title: Ultra Juicy Greek Lamb Kebabs
description: Indulge in these floral and juicy Greek lamb kebabs, featuring flaxseed and anti-inflammatory friendly ingredients, perfect for a summer dinner.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium high heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, oregano, thyme, salt, and black pepper.
Add the lamb cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Stir in the ground flaxseed and let it sit for 10 minutes to allow the flaxseed to absorb the liquid.
Thread the marinated lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Place the skewers on the grill and cook for 8-10 minutes per side, or until the lamb is cooked to 145 degrees Fahrenheit.
During the last 2 minutes of cooking, add the bay leaves to the grill to infuse the lamb with their flavor.
Remove the skewers from the grill and let them rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve the lamb kebabs hot, garnished with fresh thyme and a side of roasted vegetables.
